channel.title: Data Science on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Data Science on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

I am a supply chain and operations leader with extensive experience across manufacturing, logistics, quality, and distribution. My career has been built on driving operational excellence through data, process improvement, and cross-functional collaboration.

I am currently pursuing a Master’s in Data Science with an Artificial Intelligence specialization at Northwestern University. Through this program, I am expanding my technical capabilities in data science, data engineering, SQL, Python, and Go.

item.title: AI-Powered Quality Inspection System
item.description:
Problem

Manufacturing environments often rely on manual inspection processes that are inconsistent, slow, and difficult to scale.

Objective

Design a system that uses computer vision and analytics to detect defects earlier, improve classification accuracy, and provide root-cause data.

Tools

Python, Computer Vision, Data Analysis

item.title: Education
item.description:
Education

Master of Science in Data Science (AI Specialization)

Northwestern University
Expected 2026

Associate Degree in Computer Science & Information Systems

Middlesex College
2021

Postgraduate Certificate in Entrepreneurship and Innovation

Massachusetts Institute of Technology
2018

item.title: Home
item.description:
Gilbert Onyenwezi

Operations Leader | Data Science & Data Engineering Portfolio

I build decision-ready systems at the intersection of operations, analytics, and technology.

With a background in manufacturing, supply chain, and operational excellence, I have led initiatives focused on improving quality, efficiency, and cost performance across complex environments. I am currently advancing my technical capabilities through a Master’s in Data Science with an AI specialization at Northwestern University.

Executive Summary

Most organizations generate data. Few translate it into consistent, actionable execution. My work focuses on closing that gap through KPI systems, data pipelines, and operational decision support.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Projects

This portfolio focuses on work at the intersection of operations, analytics, quality, and data systems.
